channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Deck Officers
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Chief Officer position is available on a General Cargo vessel. The contract duration is 6 weeks on and 6 weeks off, with a salary of 6335 EUR per month. Joining is required as soon as possible. Candidates must possess an EU passport or Schengen visa.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Officer Job - General Cargo Vessel 6335 EUR per month at Stan Shipping Agency Ltd

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Chief Officer position is available on a General Cargo vessel. The contract duration is 6 weeks, with joining expected in July 2026. The daily wage offered is 200 GBP. Applicants must possess an EU passport or Schengen visa. Further details are available at the office.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Officer Job on General Cargo Vessel at Stan Shipping Agency Ltd

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Vessel Operator position is available for a bulk carrier. Candidates should have a Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Marine/Nautical Studies, Maritime Operations, or a related field, or be a former Deck/Engine Officer with relevant sea experience. A minimum of 2 years of experience in shipping or vessel operations is required. The role demands attention to detail, strong communication, and operational skills within a dynamic environment.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Vessel Operator Job on Bulk Carrier at PT Indobaruna Bulk Transport

item.description:
Location: Offshore, Qatar
Description:

A Chief Officer position is available on a DP2 Crew Boat operating offshore Qatar. Applicants must hold a valid Chief Mate STCW Certificate of Competency and a full DP License. A minimum of 12 months of actual sea-time experience is required, with prior experience on DP2 vessels being preferred. Strong knowledge of DP operations, bridge watchkeeping, passage planning, and COLREGs is essential.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Officer Job on DP2 Crew Boat in Qatar at Milaha
[Gold Job] REQUIRED CHIEF OFFICER FOR AHTS VESSEL at

item.description:
Location: Mediterranean
Description:

A Chief Officer position is available on a PSV DP2 vessel, with an immediate joining date. The contract duration is 2/2 months, with operations in the Mediterranean. Previous OSV/PSV DP2 experience and a DP full certificate are mandatory. Only EU/Ukrainian nationals or Schengen visa holders are eligible for this role.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Officer Job on PSV DP2 Vessel at tdw.com

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced Chief Officers are sought for a Pure Car and Truck Carrier (PCTC) vessel. The role offers a monthly salary range of USD 9,200–10,000. Candidates of any nationality are welcome to apply for this leadership opportunity at sea, focusing on efficient vessel operations and maintaining high safety standards.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Officer Job on PCTC Vessel USD 9,200–10,000 at One Vision Maritime (OVM)
[Gold Job] Chief Officer for NON DP AHTS vessel at

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Marine Superintendent position is available for a Multi-Purpose Vessel. Candidates with relevant experience are encouraged to apply. Further details and application instructions can be found via the provided link or by emailing with the job title.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Marine Superintendent Job - Multi-Purpose Vessel at Direct Search Global

item.description:
Location: South America
Description:

A 3rd Mate position is available on an AHT vessel in South America. The contract is temporary, lasting 6 weeks, with a joining date of July 8, 2026. Key requirements and specific duties will be detailed in the full application process.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 3rd Mate Vacancy on AHT Vessel at ORCA Crew Services
